description: Legal record (#60) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 20v of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 21 Adar II in the same year as the previous entry, 5323 AM (1563 CE). Partnership agreement between Farjallah b. Yaʿaqov מעיגן (an uncommon surname) and Aharon b. Shemuʾel al-Fuladī to work together in the shop of ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz Shemuʾel al-Fuladī (the latter's brother). The partnership includes a profit-sharing agreement of one third to each party and the business arrangement will last "for as long as ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz travels." Evidently, this is a partnership for Farjallah and Aharon to run the shop in ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz's absence. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
